name: feature
description: New feature or request

name: bug
description: Something is not working correctly

name: task
description: A discrete engineering or operational task

name: documentation
description: Improvements or additions to documentation

name: refactor
description: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

name: testing
description: Related to tests — unit, integration, or E2E

name: question
description: Further information is requested

name: duplicate
description: This issue or pull request already exists

name: help wanted
description: Extra attention or contribution is needed

name: good first issue
description: Good for newcomers — well-scoped and low risk

name: area: backend
description: Relates to the NestJS backend (tutora-api)

name: area: frontend
description: Relates to any web frontend (admin or landing)

name: area: mobile
description: Relates to the React Native / Expo mobile app

name: area: admin
description: Relates to the admin panel (React + Vite)

name: area: api
description: Relates to REST / GraphQL API contracts or endpoints

name: area: database
description: Relates to database schema, migrations, or queries

name: area: ui
description: User interface — layout, components, styling

name: area: ux
description: User experience — flows, interactions, accessibility

name: area: landing
description: Relates to the Next.js landing page (tutora-web)

name: area: devops
description: CI/CD, infrastructure, deployment, monitoring

name: area: security
description: Security — auth, permissions, vulnerabilities, secrets

name: priority: high
description: Must be addressed urgently — blocks users or releases

name: priority: medium
description: Important but not immediately blocking

name: priority: low
description: Nice to have — address when bandwidth allows

name: status: blocked
description: Cannot proceed — waiting on a dependency or decision

name: status: ready for review
description: Implementation complete — awaiting code review

name: status: in progress
description: Actively being worked on

name: status: done
description: Completed and merged / closed

name: performance
description: Relates to speed, throughput, or resource usage
